# Keys by Shalanda

> Texas mortgage broker specializing in VA loans, physician loans, and home purchase financing for military families and first-time buyers across Texas.

Keys by Shalanda is a mortgage brokerage led by Shalanda Smith (NMLS #554554) under Secure Choice Lending (NMLS #1689518). The site provides loan program information, mortgage calculators, educational guides, and application tools for homebuyers and refinancers in Texas — with deep expertise in VA loans for military families stationed at Fort Hood and across Central Texas.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Texas mortgage broker for VA, physician, and conventional loans.
- [About](/about): Meet Shalanda Smith, NMLS #554554, and learn the brokerage mission.
- [Apply](/apply): Start your mortgage application online.
- [Thank You](/thank-you): Application submission confirmation page.

## VA Loans

- [VA Loan Texas](/va-loan-texas): Overview of VA loan benefits and eligibility in Texas.
- [VA Loan FAQ Texas](/va-loan-faq-texas): Frequently asked questions about Texas VA loans.
- [Killeen VA Loan](/killeen-va-loan): VA loans for Fort Hood and Killeen-area military buyers.
- [Copperas Cove VA Loan](/copperas-cove-va-loan): VA loan guidance for Copperas Cove homebuyers.
- [El Paso VA Loan](/el-paso-va-loan): VA loan resources for El Paso military families.
- [VA Appraisal Checklist](/va-appraisal-checklist): Interactive checklist for VA inspection readiness.
- [VA Funding Fee Calculator](/va-funding-fee-calculator): Calculate your VA funding fee.
- [VA Loan Calculator Texas](/va-loan-calculator-texas): Estimate VA loan payments in Texas.

## Physician Loans

- [Physician Loan Texas](/physician-loan-texas): Doctor and dentist mortgage programs across Texas.
- [Physician Loan Austin](/physician-loan-austin-tx): Physician loans in Austin, TX.
- [Physician Loan Dallas](/physician-loan-dallas-tx): Physician loans in Dallas, TX.
- [Physician Loan Houston](/physician-loan-houston-tx): Physician loans in Houston, TX.
- [Physician Loan San Antonio](/physician-loan-san-antonio-tx): Physician loans in San Antonio, TX.

## City Mortgages

- [Austin TX Mortgage](/austin-tx-mortgage): Home loans and mortgage rates in Austin.
- [Dallas TX Mortgage](/dallas-tx-mortgage): Mortgage services for Dallas-area buyers.
- [Houston TX Mortgage](/houston-tx-mortgage): Home financing in Houston, Texas.
- [San Antonio TX Mortgage](/san-antonio-tx-mortgage): Mortgage solutions for San Antonio.
- [Temple TX Mortgage](/temple-tx-mortgage): Home loans in Temple, Texas.
- [Round Rock TX Mortgage](/round-rock-tx-mortgage): Mortgage options in Round Rock.
- [Georgetown TX Mortgage](/georgetown-tx-mortgage): Home financing in Georgetown, TX.

## Loan Programs

- [Loan Programs](/loan-programs): Full directory of available mortgage products.
- [Conventional Loan Texas](/conventional-loan-texas): Conventional mortgage requirements in Texas.
- [FHA Loan Texas](/fha-loan-texas): FHA loan guidelines and down payment options.
- [Construction & Renovation Loans](/construction-renovation-loans-texas): Build or renovate financing.
- [Down Payment Assistance](/down-payment-assistance-texas): Texas down payment help programs.
- [First-Time Buyers](/first-time-buyers): Guidance for first-time homebuyers in Texas.
- [Investors](/investors): Financing for real estate investors and rental properties.
- [PCS to Portfolio](/pcs-to-portfolio): Turn military moves into rental investments.

- [Calculators](/calculators): Full suite of mortgage and financial calculators.
- [BAH Calculator Killeen](/bah-calculator-killeen-tx): Basic Allowance for Housing calculator.
